services.title: Safety First
services.body: Trained staff with first aid certification

services.title: Flexible Hours
services.body: Extended hours to fit your schedule

faqs.a: Yes, we are fully registered with Ofsted.

faqs.q: What kind of snacks do you provide?
faqs.a: We offer a variety of healthy and nutritious snacks daily.

faqs.q: Do you have homework help available?
faqs.a: Absolutely, our professional tutors assist with homework every day.
Our flexible hours range from school dismissal until 6 PM.
